sections_cited: Section 33 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6408 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.28634/2024 2. For hearing of main case 31.01.2025 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed, advocate for the petitioner Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel for the respondent department the impugned sealing order under Section 33 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990 is appealable order per Section 46 of Sales Tax Act, 1990, hence, direct recourse to writ is not maintainable. Learned counsel for the petitioner could not controvert the aforesaid. In view of the same petition is dismissed, leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail remedy as may be available under the law. Judge Judge Amjad
